description_long: This is a modern military jet aircraft with a sleek, angular design and a low-visibility profile. The fuselage is painted in a matte gray color, with sharp, faceted surfaces and twin vertical stabilizers at the rear. The wings are short and swept, equipped with multiple hardpoints carrying missiles or other ordnance. The cockpit canopy is tinted and smoothly integrated into the body, providing a streamlined appearance. The undercarriage is not visible, suggesting it is retracted, and the engine exhaust is located at the rear center. The overall construction appears robust, with visible panel lines and reinforced sections indicating armored protection.
description: A matte gray, angular military jet with twin vertical stabilizers, swept wings, and visible missile mounts. The design is streamlined and robust, with a tinted cockpit and reinforced body panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, tinted cockpit canopy, and symmetrical missile mounts under each wing.
description_view_1: Left-side perspective highlighting the angular fuselage, swept wing, and visible hardpoints with mounted missiles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, central engine exhaust, and the full span of the wings with mounted ordnance.
description_view_3: Right-side perspective similar to the left, showing the streamlined body, wing-mounted missiles, and tail structure.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Eight visible hardpoints under the wings, each equipped with missile mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with visibly reinforced and faceted panels, especially around the cockpit and engine areas.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte gray color with no visible camouflage pattern.
